zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Felton於1299年出生在英國諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆時，他的父親William de Felton40歲，母親Constance Pontop36歲。他於大約1332年與Isabel Heron在英國諾圖波藍德費爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年9月21日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Felton于1299年出生在英国諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆时，他的父亲William de Felton40岁，母亲Constance Pontop36岁。他于大约1332年与Isabel Heron在英国諾圖波藍德費爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年9月21日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德艾德林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Felton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called. Most of them, including those in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset (Winford), are named from Old English feld ‘pasture, open country’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Another place of the same name in Somerset, also known as Whitchurch, has as its first element Old English filethe ‘hay’. Felton Hill in Northumberland is named with the Old English personal name Fygla (a derivative of fugol ‘bird’; compare Fowle ).

variants.name: Fowle
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Felton was born in 1299, in Edlingham, Northumberland, England, his father, William de Felton, was 40 and his mother, Constance Pontop, was 36. He married Isabel Heron about 1332, in Felton, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 September 1358, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Edlingham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Felton est né en 1299, à Edlingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William de Felton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Constance Pontop, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Heron environ 1332, à Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1358, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Edlingham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Felton 1299 in Edlingham, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Felton 40 und seine Mutter Constance Pontop 36. Er hat um 1332 in Felton, Northumberland, England Isabel Heron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. September 1358 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Edlingham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Felton è nato il nel 1299 nel Edlingham, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William de Felton, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Constance Pontop, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Heron circa 1332, nel Felton, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1358, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Edlingham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Feltonが1299年にイギリスノースウンバーランドエドリンガムで生まれた時，父William de Feltonは40歳，母Constance Pontopは36歳であった。約1332年にイギリスノースウンバーランドフエルトンでIsabel Heronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年9月21日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドエドリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Felton(이)가 1299년 영국 노르스벌랜드 에들링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Felton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Pontop(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1332년 영국 노르스벌랜드 프턴에서 Isabel Heron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 9월 21일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 에들링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Felton nasceu em 1299, em Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Felton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Constance Pontop, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Heron aproximadamente 1332, em Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1358, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Felton родился в 1299 г. в местности эдлингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Felton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Pontop, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Heron около 1332 г. в местности фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 сентября 1358 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности эдлингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Felton nació en 1299, en Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Felton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Constance Pontop, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Isabel Heron aproximadamente 1332, en Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1358, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Edlingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
